title: Antártida: un mensaje de otro planeta
original_title: Antártida: un mensaje de otro planeta
overview: The first documentary that describes the official policy and coverage of the sixth continent. With humor and beautiful landscapes in 4k, we will find out if Antarctica is an example of global peace, science and the environment, the scene of the next great war.

trailers.title: Antártida: un mensaje de otro planeta dir. Mario Cuesta Hernando.
